title: [CI:DOCS] update a couple of lists in the build man page
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind documentation

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

The buildah-build man page enumerates the default set of masked and read-only paths, but that list is hardwired into one of our dependencies, and we didn't update this man page when it changed.

#### How to verify it

Visual inspection.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
